entry.title: New: GREAT-5(6) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
CASE UPDATE REGARDING CHELSIE EVANS, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS THE PERSONAL REPRESENTATIVE OF THE ESTATE OF TRE’ PUʻUWAILAʻAHIAOLOPAKAAMELEHUANANI EVANS-DUMARAN, DECEASED, V. SCOTT MARTIN, CIVIL 2CCV-24-0000034 (GREAT-5(6))

Government Relations, Ethics, and Transparency Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
